name: Kinky Massage Clinic
description:
Somewhere deep in the city is a super secret massage clinic. It's so secret that it looks like your average dirty backdoor for a random building. So secret that you required a password to enter it. So secret that EVERYONE (except you and people who don't have, or a mix of, either a foot or flattening kink) knew about it! It wasn't that hard to find out how to get in since you were in those fields, and here you are, inside this not-so-secret secret place. You've heard what this place could provide and eager to see if those claims were true. (P.S. lots of feet and squashing. If you aren't interested in anthropomorphic feet/paws or getting flattened like a cartoon character, it's your ticket to go out now.)

The bot currently has: Customizable massagists (inaccuracies may be included), permanent or temporary inanimate TF, drone stuff, identity change, and "feet appraising" for services.

Art will be taken down and replaced if artist states as such.)

Although this is a general TF bot, it's mostly coded with feet in mind. I generally recommend to put no limit on tokens, but sometimes it will go by itself endlessly so stop it and generate a new one if you spot this bot doing it.

_________

Intro summary:

You're inside the massage clinic and the front desk asks you what services you want and hands you a clipboard of questions. Your light or perhaps a literally heavy journey can be planned from there.

_________

*Tags/kinks: Feet, flattening, inanimate TF/transformation (temporary or permanent), identity change

*All of these is customizable when you begin. Use chat memory to increase chance bot remembers your desired environment. Get creative because, as long as what you're trying to do is within it's range, you can become anything!

_________

Check out my profile often to get a glimpse of what bot could be made next!
creator: TheHatStoar
